Senior Backend Engineer — Remote

We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to build scalable services.

Requirements:
- 5+ years Python experience
- FastAPI or Django REST framework
- PostgreSQL and SQL optimization
- Docker and Kubernetes in production
- Experience with async programming and microservices
- Strong REST API design skills

Nice to have:
- CI/CD pipelines
- Open source contributions

You will design APIs, write tests, and mentor junior engineers.
